callGraph.callee:
launchCommandInPane({
				paneId,
				tabId,
				workspaceId,
				command,
				cwd,
				waitForMountedSession: options?.waitForMountedSession,
				createOrAttach: (input) => createOrAttach.mutateAsync(input),
				write: (input) => writeToTerminal.mutateAsync(input),
			}).catch

functions.name: findReusableFileViewerPane
params:
{
	workspaceId,
	activeTabId,
	tabs,
	panes,
	tabHistoryStacks,
	reuseExisting,
	options,
}

functions.name: activatePaneInWorkspace
params:
{
	workspaceId,
	paneId,
	tabs,
	panes,
	activeTabIds,
	focusedPaneIds,
	tabHistoryStacks,
}
